chunks.text_preview: Jeanne Thérèse du Han de Martigny ( 30 October 1707 in Lunéville – 7 May 1748 in Nancy ) was born and baptized the same day in Lunéville , in the duchy of Lorraine , now part of France . She was the daughter of Philippe - Louis du Han , comte de Martigny ( 1678 – 1733 ) and his wife Catherine Franço
